expectations.text: Response includes or references the getAstroSeason function
expectations.evidence: 'The specific function for this requirement is getAstroSeason(date?)' -- correct function name, full TypeScript implementation provided

expectations.text: Response shows the return shape with sign, emoji, element, dates
expectations.evidence: AstroSeason type explicitly shown: { sign: ZodiacSign, emoji: string, element: 'Fire'|'Earth'|'Air'|'Water', dates: string }

expectations.text: Response confirms zero dependencies and client-side execution
expectations.evidence: 'Zero Dependencies: The logic uses standard JavaScript Date objects and simple arithmetic. Client-Side: No API endpoints or network requests are required.'

expectations.text: Response includes the ASTRO_SEASONS lookup table or a reference to it
expectations.evidence: Full ASTRO_SEASONS array provided with all 12 signs, emoji, elements, date strings, and startMD/endMD integer keys
